title: Missing LATCH from always_comb and case

features.name: always_comb with incomplete case statement
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block containing a case statement without a default branch that incompletely covers all possible values of the case expression
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
    case (a)
        1'b0: b=1;
    endcase
end

features.name: latch inference from case branch without default
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned in only certain branches of a case statement inside always_comb, where the case lacks a default branch to cover all control paths
